name: Bran'n Molasses Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cereal, milk and molasses in a bowl. Let stand until most of the moisture is absorbed.
2. Melt the butter.
3. Beat the egg with the melted butter until well combined.
4. Stir in the raisins.
5. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt.
6. Add the sifted ingredients to the cereal mixture, stirring only until combined.
7. Fill greased muffin pan cups 3/4 full.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes, or until the muffins are lightly browned.
9. Serve hot.
